indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a stable, non-slip surface suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: There is enough open space to accommodate a yoga mat and allow for movement.

indicators.name: minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: The presence of only a few pieces of furniture does not obstruct the floor space.

indicators.name: vase on dresser
indicators.rationale: A decorative item on the dresser could potentially be moved to create more open space.

reasoning_summary: The space is moderately suitable for yoga, with hardwood flooring and open floor space allowing for movement. However, the presence of a decorative vase on the dresser could be rearranged to further improve the space for yoga practice.
